title: Old School Minecraft
description: Brings back the old Alpha/Beta feel of Minecraft! While having the new features!
body:
Have you ever wished Minecraft had the same old feel like it did during the alpha and beta days, But still had the new features and items? If so then this modpack is for you!

![Herobrine...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f736d526366b8b7e463001fa274c7d0e872c368f.png)

> Some say Herobrine still lurks in the fog to this day

## Features
This modpack Brings back the old menus, chests, Old world terrain, old animations, XP and hunger removed, and much much more

Press **O** To customize these settings. (Or alternatively you can click on the **Mod** Button and customize more mods)

## How to make a old school world ***(Fabric Only)***
1.  Make sure the _World Type_ is **Modern Beta** or **Moderner Beta**
2. Press **Customize**
3. Set your World type (like Beta, Indev, Alpha, Even the Xbox 360) 
4. Then your seed (Like the Famous Glacier and gargamel)
5. Create and enjoy your old school world :D

## Recommend Stuff

[Beta Continuum](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/beta-continuum/) - shmoobalizer & swigly - "All the textures you know and love, as well as old-school reinterpretations of modern features"

[Developer Art Classic](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/devart-classic/) - shmoobalizer - "Developer Art Classic Is a resource pack that makes the textures made by JAPPA Fit in the stye of the Developer art, while also have the old Beta Textures" 

[Simpler Times](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/the-og-minecraft/) - swigly - "Simpler Times is a resource pack that makes textures originally made by JAPPA fit in the Old alpha textures"

[Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) - PoeticRainbow - "Golden Days is a suite of texture packs for Minecraft that send your game back in time. They changes blocks, items, mobs, and even GUI elements to be inspired by the past."

**Message me on discord for bugs or mods you want me to add! Minix07**
